erxes-operation-description: Any erxes GraphQL query or mutation
web-search-description: Search Wikipedia for articles related to a query.
fetch-url-description: Fetch full text content of a Wikipedia article by title.
calculator-description: Evaluate a mathematical expression and return the numeric result.
operations-discovered-at-runtime: Operations are discovered from the gateway at runtime.
search-operations-placeholder: Search by what it does or its name… (e.g. "create deal")
response-fields-hint: Space-separated GraphQL fields to return. Used only when the operation returns an object type.
identity-description: The LLM uses the name and description to decide when to call this tool.
tool-id-hint: Unique machine identifier. Auto-generated from name.
description-placeholder: What this tool does — the LLM uses this to decide when to call it
disabled-tools-hint: Disabled tools won't be available to any agent
